titlStmt.titl: DDI description: Anonymous Questions and Expert Responses in the Sinuiksi Online Question and Answer Service 2014-2015

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

titlStmt.titl: Anonymous Questions and Expert Responses in the Sinuiksi Online Question and Answer Service 2014-2015

rspStmt.AuthEnty: Sinuiksi. Sinuiksi tuki- ja neuvontapalvelu [Sinuiksi. Sinuiksi online question and answer service]

prodStmt.copyright: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.

serInfo.p: Individual datasets that do not belong to any series.

citation.biblCit: Sinuiksi: Anonymous Questions and Expert Responses in the Sinuiksi Online Question and Answer Service 2014-2015 [dataset]. Data version 1.0 (2022-12-20). Finnish Social Science Data Archive [distributor]. DOI: https://doi.org/10.60686/t-fsd3524; URN: https://urn.fi/urn:nbn:fi:fsd:T-FSD3524

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

abstract.p: The dataset consists of questions sent to the Sinuiksi online question and answer service for sexual and gender minorities and the expert responses received. The questions mainly concern experiences related to sexuality and gender, as well as various challenges in life. The individuals who sent questions were mainly young people. The data were collected as part of the Just the two of us? Affective inequalities in intimate relationships research project.

Many of the topics in the question-answer pairs relate to different themes of sexuality, such as sexual orientation, sexual identity, and sex. These include reflections on issues such as asexuality and sexual diversity. The material also covers issues related to gender, such as gender diversity, gender identity, gender expression and conflicting experiences of one's own gender. The question-answer pairs reflect a range of concerns and challenges in life. Many of these relate to a need for peer support and the difficulty of expressing feelings. In addition to these, themes that appear in the data include mental health, identity, coming out, dating, loneliness, bullying, romantic relationships, and other relationships.
The dataset is only available in Finnish.

sumDscr.universe: Individuals who sent messages to the Sinuiksi online question and answer service and the Sinuiksi experts who replied to the messages

sampProc.p: All questions that were sent to the Sinuiksi online question and answer service in 2014 and 2015 and the expert responses received were selected as data units.

dataColl.resInstru: Other research instrument Other The question-answer pairs were copied from the Sinuiksi website and saved in ODT file format

method.stdyClas: Detailed and specific data description in Finnish and English. The data are checked and processed in detail. If necessary, the data are anonymised.

setAvail.complete: One data file was removed during the archiving process, as it was a duplicate of another data file in the dataset.

useStmt.restrctn: The dataset is (A) openly available for all users without registration (CC BY 4.0).
useStmt.citReq: The data and its creators shall be cited in all publications and presentations for which the data have been used. The bibliographic citation may be in the form suggested by the archive or in the form required by the publication.
useStmt.deposReq: Notify FSD of all publications where you have used the data by sending the citation information to user-services.fsd@tuni.fi.
useStmt.disclaimer: The original data creators and the archive bear no responsibility for any results or interpretations arising from the reuse of the data.

dataAccs.notes: The data were anonymised at FSD by removing any personal data and indirect identifiers such as names, pseydonyms and contact details of the persons who submitted the questions and third parties. In addition, mentions of locations, family, and social media use were coarsened into broader categories or removed. Changes made at FSD are marked with [square brackets].

othrStdyMat.relPubl:
Lahti, Annukka & Kolehmainen, Marjo (2020). LGBTIQ+ break-up assemblages: At the end of the rainbow. Journal of Sociology. 56(4), 608-628. doi:10.1177/1440783320964545
LGBTIQ+ break-up assemblages: At the end of the rainbow 10.1177/1440783320964545

Recker, J., & Perry, A. (2024). Data on the Margins - Data from LGBTIQ+ Populations in European Social Science Data Archives. Data Science Journal 23(1), 39. https://doi.org/10.5334/dsj-2024-039
Data on the Margins - Data from LGBTIQ+ Populations in European Social Science Data Archives 10.5334/dsj-2024-039

Sahla, Erika (2024). "Tahtoisin siis kysyä olenko normaali". Heteronormatiivisuuden ylläpitäminen nuorten seksuaalineuvontapalveluun lähettämissä huolissa. Yhteiskuntatutkimuksen kandidaatintutkielma. Tampere: Tampereen yliopisto.
"Tahtoisin siis kysyä olenko normaali". Heteronormatiivisuuden ylläpitäminen nuorten seksuaalineuvontapalveluun lähettämissä huolissa URN:NBN:fi:tuni-202401081159
